issue.title: earnow.online
issue.body:
### Issue URL (Anti Adblock Script) [http://earnow.online/Fpjn4bG](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=http%3A%2F%2Fearnow.online%2FFpjn4bG) ### Comment > 1枚目AdGuardあり > 画面上部にValidation attempt denied1. Disable adblocker or bypass extension then reload! > と表示されて、メーターが動かない。 > > > 2枚目AdGuard無し > Scroll downと表示され、メーターが読み込まれている。 > > また、このメーターが読み込まれなければ、「私はロボットではありません」が表示されないため、次へ行くことができない。 ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/ta50i7obw9c84sw0gssoko0skcswss0onawp7ssq6s.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 2 ![Screenshot 2](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/hququld4pzk8kgwo0kss080o0c8gsoc9jf28u98n2o.png?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard Browser Extension v5.4.3.1 MV2 System version: | `Windows 10` Browser: | Firefox Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter,
EasyList

**Privacy:**
AdGuard Tracking Protection filter

**Annoyances:**
AdGuard Cookie Notices filter,
AdGuard Popups filter,
AdGuard Mobile App Banners filter,
AdGuard Other Annoyances filter,
AdGuard Widgets filter

**Security:**
Online Malicious URL Blocklist,
Phishing URL Blocklist

**Language-specific:**
AdGuard Japanese filter,
AdGuard Chinese filter Filters last update: | 2026-05-29T23:16:09Z Tracking protection: | disabled Browsing Security: | enabled Browsing Security statistics: | disabled ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/settings/import.html?scheme_version=4&product_type=ext&product_version=5.4.3.1&system_version=Windows+10&ext.manifest_version=2&browser=firefox&regular_filters=2%2C3%2C7%2C18%2C19%2C20%2C21%2C22%2C101%2C208%2C224%2C255&filters_last_update=2026-05-29T23%3A16%3A09Z&browsing_security.enabled=1&browsing_security.statistics_enabled=0&stealth.enabled=0)
